Interface IDomainNetwork

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of a domain network.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("D636240D-F66B-4D88-BAF5-E0B794EF18BD")]
public interface IDomainNetwork

Properties

CreationTime

Returns the creation time.

object CreationTime { get; }

Property Value

object

Sample Snippet

Returns the domain network alias name.

string DomainNetworkAliasName { get; }

string

Returns the domain network ID.

int DomainNetworkID { get; }

int

Sample Snippet

Returns the domain network name.

string

Sample Snippet

IsStructureNetwork

Returns whether the network is a structure network.

bool IsStructureNetwork { get; }

bool

Sample Snippet

ReleaseNumber

Returns the release number.

int ReleaseNumber { get; }

int

Sample Snippet

Returns the array of network sources in this domain network.

IArray Sources { get; }

IArray
